headline: Canadian National Achieves Robust Grain Performance Record in May
summary: CNI sets a May 2026 grain-shipping record, moving 2.96M metric tonnes from Western Canada as export demand and supplies stay strong.

headline: Ryanair's May Traffic Numbers Show Five-Month Straight Growth
summary: RYAAY's passengers rise 6% year over year to 20.7M in May 2026, with load factor flat year over year at 95%.

headline: CP's Record Grain Haul Reflects Strong Export Demand & Network Fluidity
summary: CP moves record May grain volumes, hauling 2.9M metric tons and 30,324 carloads, as strong export demand and efficiency fuel momentum.
